description: This file defines an ESLint configuration array that extends specific shared configs for Next.js, core web vitals, and TypeScript.

methods.name: __filename
methods.description: Defines the filename using URL and path modules.

methods.name: __dirname
methods.description: Defines the directory name of this file.

methods.name: compat
methods.description: An instance of FlatCompat used to process ESLint configuration extensions.

methods.name: eslintConfig
methods.description: An array of extended ESLint configurations for Next.js and TypeScript.
